'''jawopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibutilide|ibutilide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibutilide|ibutilide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jawopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæwepeth|jæwepeth]] || [[word:jæwepej|jæwepej]] || [[word:jæwepesh|jæwepesh]] || [[word:jæwepe|jæwepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jawowopoth|jawowopoth]] || [[word:jawowopoj|jawowopoj]] || [[word:jawowoposh|jawowoposh]] || [[word:jawowopo|jawowopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jawopoth|jawopoth]] || [[word:jawopoj|jawopoj]] || [[word:jawoposh|jawoposh]] || [[word:jawopo|jawopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jawofpoth|jawofpoth]] || [[word:jawofpoj|jawofpoj]] || [[word:jawofposh|jawofposh]] || [[word:jawofpof|jawofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jawopotho|jawopotho]] || [[word:jawopojo|jawopojo]] || [[word:jawoposho|jawoposho]] || [[word:jawopoko|jawopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jawopoth|jawopoth]] || [[word:jawopoj|jawopoj]] || [[word:jawoposh|jawoposh]] || [[word:jawopo|jawopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jawopothol|jawopothol]] || [[word:jawopojol|jawopojol]] || [[word:jawoposhol|jawoposhol]] || [[word:jawopokol|jawopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jawopothotho|jawopothotho]] || [[word:jawopojojo|jawopojojo]] || [[word:jawoposhosho|jawoposhosho]] || [[word:jawopoko|jawopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jawopothon|jawopothon]] || [[word:jawopojon|jawopojon]] || [[word:jawoposhon|jawoposhon]] || [[word:jawopokon|jawopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jawopothoro|jawopothoro]] || [[word:jawopojoro|jawopojoro]] || [[word:jawoposhoro|jawoposhoro]] || [[word:jawopokoro|jawopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
